demo.title: Conversational queries, intuitive and efficient
demo.userMessage: How has TSMC performed in the last 3 days?
demo.aiResponse:
Based on the latest data, TSMC (2330) performance over the past 3 days:
• 2/5: Closed at NT$1,765 (-1.12%)
• 2/4: Closed at NT$1,785 (-0.83%)
• 2/3: Closed at NT$1,800 (+1.98%)

claudeAi.title: Claude.ai
claudeAi.description: Use directly on the web, the easiest way to start
claudeAi.step1: Open Claude.ai, go to Settings → Connectors
claudeAi.step2: Click Add custom connector, enter the Fugle MCP Server URL

claudeCode.title: Claude Code
claudeCode.description: Use in the terminal, the efficient choice for developers
claudeCode.step2: Run the command to add Fugle MCP Server
claudeCode.step3: Enter /mcp to complete OAuth, start chatting

chatgpt.title: ChatGPT Users
chatgpt.step2: Search for "Fugle" and enable the App

developer.title: Developers
developer.step1: Install Claude Code or an MCP-compatible client
developer.step2: Connect to Fugle Remote MCP Server
developer.step3: Start using Taiwan stock data tools
